# nobetplani.com

> Nobetplani.com is an automated duty scheduling tool for healthcare and other shift-based teams. It uses constraint-based optimization (CP-SAT) to generate fair, conflict-free duty rosters.

## Features
- Automatic duty assignment using CP-SAT optimization
- Customizable daily staff capacity per day
- Weekend and weekday duty balancing
- Per-person unavailability and preference settings
- Minimum rest days between duties
- Group scheduling (team members assigned together)
- Cloud save, export (Excel/PDF), and shareable links
- Infeasibility diagnostics with actionable suggestions

## Target Users
Healthcare staff schedulers, hospital administrators, clinic managers, and any team requiring fair rotation-based shift planning.

## Links
- App: https://nobetplani.com
